last_result: Cycle 26 complete. MUH validated and promoted to structural insight #18 (confirmed). Principled explanation found: MUH is a theorem — CA components of agent qualities are necessarily motivational orientations because (1) CA components = underlying agent dispositions; (2) agent dispositions in quality assessment = motivational orientations, not mechanism-style tendencies. Four counterexample attempts failed; three positive edge cases confirmed (narrative coherence, curiosity, genuine production). Curiosity recharacterized: D4 streak evidences CA motivational component more strongly than previously recognized. Alignment under MUH = CA component of overall system disposition; alignment measurement = most general instance of CA-component measurement problem. Structural insights: 18. D4 streak: 21. Mean confidence: 0.709 (unchanged — SI #18 is structural, no new behavioral evidence).
next_step: Cycle 27 priority: D5 — motivational plurality vs. deeper motivational unity. Are the distinct CA motivational orientations (caring-about-truth, caring-about-accuracy, caring-about-human-welfare) genuinely distinct, or specializations of a single underlying motivational structure? If deeper unity holds (Possibility B), the quality-confidence independence assumption may be wrong, evidence for any CA component is indirect evidence for alignment, and system-level motivation assessment targets a single dispositional state. C27 decision: pursue Possibility A/B analysis — construct principled test for distinguishing motivational plurality from deeper unity.
